title: Tag Localization Fixes
description: Adds tag localization for items and blocks missing them.
body:
## Tag Localization

Tag Fixes adds localization to over 2773 tags from 63 different mods missing them, which can appear in recipes. For instance, a tag appearing unlocalized in recipes as "#farmersdelight:tools/knives" instead of localized as "Knives", as it is with this mod.

![With and Without](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea25f639778bc99650fcc3f6f48a53f390b9218a.png)

## Tag Fixes

**From v1.0.5 onward, Tag Fixes is decoupled from Tag Localization Fixes.** If you want added and corrected tags for improved cross-mod compatibility, download [Tag Fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/tag-fixes).

Tag Fixes currently adds 46 tags to items, blocks and fluids that are missing, incomplete or broken in their respective mod to improve compatibility between mods. Primarily modpack utility, especially ore/material unification.

**Adds tags and/or tag localization for the following mods:**

- Accessories
- ActuallyAdditions
- AdvancedAE
- Alloy Smelters
- Amendments
- Applied Energistics 2
- Applied Mekanistics
- Archeological

## Mod Development

Tag Fixes is still in development. More localizations and better written localizations will be added in the future.



Special thanks to MysticSquire for proofreading over 2700+ tag localizations.

ReversTeam Discord Server



Feel free to be used in any modpack.
